scene.description: KEEPER ITERATION LOG — a secure file, opened by accident. Versions of you, lined up. None of them is marked false. Every one reads: ACTIVE HISTORICAL STATE.

fragments.label: Iteration: Different Decisions
fragments.text: A you who archived everything as recorded. Never rewrote a thing. Trusted the system to the end.

fragments.label: Iteration: Different Feeling
fragments.text: A you who felt none of this. Flat. Efficient. Closed every case without flinching.

fragments.label: Iteration: Different Alignment
fragments.text: A you who sided with Eden. Who thought continuity was worth the deletions.

fragments.label: Iteration: Different Maya
fragments.symbol: A you whose Maya speaks warmly, without caution. In that record she is not hiding anything. You don't recognize her.

interpretations.label: Insist you are one continuous person
Accept you are a selection of previous selves
